data.title: An address deposited 31.45 million SKY tokens into Binance, worth $2.46 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, SKY was listed on the Upbit Korean Won trading pair today. SKY briefly touched $0.087 on Binance before falling back, a 16% increase. Following the listing announcement, an address (0x6c2...f3f14) withdrew 31.45 million SKY tokens from the Sky staking contract and deposited them into Binance, worth $2.46 million, at a deposit price of $0.078. The current price is $0.072.

data.title: Japanese Stocks Continue Decline, Nikkei Falls for Fourth Consecutive Day
data.description: Japanese stocks extended their decline, marking the fourth consecutive day of losses. According to RTHK, the Nikkei Index closed at 51,063 points, down 822 points, or 1.58%. Over the month of March, Japanese stocks fell by more than 13%, although they recorded a 1.4% increase for the first quarter.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Security Alert Issued for OpenClaw Users Over Potential Axios Threat
data.description:
On March 31, a security alert was issued by SlowMist founder Yu Jian, warning users about potential risks associated with the latest version 3.28 of OpenClaw. According to BlockBeats, there is a possibility that this version may introduce a compromised version of axios, a widely used library. Users are advised to conduct thorough checks to ensure their systems are not affected.

Earlier today, 1M AI News reported that axios has been subjected to a supply chain attack, with two new versions introducing malicious dependencies. It is recommended that users immediately roll back to previous versions to mitigate any potential threats.

data.title: UN Report: Middle East Faces $200 Billion Economic Loss Due to Conflict
data.description: According to Jin10, a recent United Nations study reveals that the ongoing conflict involving the United States and Israel against Iran could result in nearly $200 billion in lost economic growth for the Middle East. The United Nations Development Programme released an analysis early Tuesday on the socio-economic impact on Arab nations, indicating that the turmoil from the war could lead to a GDP loss ranging from $120 billion to $194 billion. The agency examined various scenarios to assess the conflict's impact, which began on February 28, on regional countries. The report's authors highlighted that even if the war ends swiftly, the damage will be profound. The overall economic loss could increase the region's unemployment rate by up to 4 percentage points, resulting in approximately 3.6 million job losses and pushing up to 4 million people into poverty. The hardest-hit areas are expected to be the Gulf Cooperation Council member states and the Levant region, with GDP losses in both areas projected to exceed 5.2%.

data.title: Huobi HTX will be listed on EDGE (edgeX) at 20:30 today.
data.description: Huobi HTX announced that it will open EDGE deposits at 15:00 (GMT+8) on March 31st. EDGE/USDT spot trading will open at 20:30 (GMT+8) on March 31st. EDGE withdrawals will open at 20:30 (GMT+8) on April 1st. EDGE is reportedly a recently popular PERPDEX project. EdgeX is a 24/7 decentralized finance (DeFi) layer serving global assets, with transaction execution latency of less than 10 milliseconds. The platform has accumulated over $800 billion in trading volume and serves over 300,000 users.

data.title: Middle East Conflict Raises Concerns Over Economic Growth, U.S. Treasury Yields Decline
data.description: Due to escalating concerns over economic growth amid Middle East conflicts, U.S. Treasury yields fell during the Asian trading session. According to Jin10, investors are closely monitoring the JOLTS job openings data. A month after the outbreak of war between the U.S., Israel, and Iran, there are no signs of the situation cooling down. High oil prices may not only drive inflation but also slow global economic growth by weakening consumer demand. Olivier Assier from SimCorp noted in a report that the initially unlikely scenario of stagflation is becoming increasingly credible. According to Tradeweb data, the yield on two-year U.S. Treasury notes fell by 2.1 basis points to 3.806%, while the yield on ten-year notes decreased by 1.9 basis points to 4.322%.

data.title: Binance Adds Tether Gold (XAUT) as Collateral for Loan Services
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, Tether Gold (XAUT) has been introduced as a new collateral asset for both the Flexible Rate Loan and VIP Loan services. This addition aims to enhance the borrowing options available to users on the platform.

The Binance Flexible Rate Loan is an isolated, overcollateralized, open-term loan product. It allows users to create isolated loan positions with distinct collateral-loan pairs, such as [USDT collateral + ETH loan] or [USDT collateral + BTC loan]. Each position comes with specific Loan-to-Value (LTV) ratios, as well as margin call and liquidation LTV levels. This structure provides users with flexibility in managing their loan positions.

In addition, the Binance VIP Loan service caters to both personal and institutional clients, offering large over-collateralized loans with competitive rates and terms. This service is designed to unlock greater potential for users, enabling them to achieve objectives such as increased liquidity for long-term investments, leveraged trading, and hedging strategies.

Users interested in these loan services can refer to the Loan Data for the latest interest rates and a comprehensive list of loanable and collateral assets. The introduction of Tether Gold (XAUT) as a collateral option is expected to provide users with more diverse opportunities for managing their digital assets effectively.

data.title: Iranian Official Criticizes U.S. and Israeli Plans for Strait of Hormuz
data.description: Ibrahim Zolfaghari has stated that any efforts by the United States and Israel to exert control over the Strait of Hormuz are destined to fail. According to NS3.AI, Zolfaghari emphasized that the leaders of these nations have underestimated Iran's resolve and have not accounted for the resistance they would face from both the Iranian public and its armed forces.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | COMEX Gold Futures Surpass $4,500 Amid Bullish Momentum
data.description: RHB Research analyst Joseph Chai noted that COMEX gold futures have exceeded $4,500 per ounce, displaying increasing bullish momentum on the daily chart. According to NS3.AI, Chai highlighted that while the next resistance level is now a focal point, the declining 20-day simple moving average might introduce significant selling pressure.

data.title: Analysts: "Physical reality" drives oil price surge; Trump's verbal intervention has little effect.
data.description: Energy market consultancy FGE NexantECA stated that if the near-closure of the Strait of Hormuz due to the Iran conflict continues for the next six to eight weeks, oil prices could surge to $150 or even $200 per barrel. Fereidun Fesharaki, the firm's honorary chairman, said on Tuesday, "One hundred million barrels of oil cannot pass through each week, and four hundred million barrels per month. Therefore, over time, the losses suffered by the market will be astronomical." Fesharaki expressed skepticism about the effectiveness of Trump's verbal intervention (including statements about a possible end to the conflict), arguing that the "physical reality" of supply disruptions will ultimately drive prices. He stated bluntly, "As long as the Strait of Hormuz is physically closed, prices will naturally rise. Whatever Trump says politically will be of no use." (Jinshi)

data.title: Iranian military: The US and Israel's attempt to control the Strait of Hormuz will never succeed.
data.description: Ibrahim Zolfagari, spokesman for the Hatem Anbia Central Command of the Iranian Armed Forces, stated that the strategic miscalculations of the United States and Israel regarding the situation in Iran are leading to their destruction, and any attempt to control the Strait of Hormuz will be futile. The spokesman said that the miscalculations by US and Israeli leaders have led them to attempt to assess Iran's strength using material measures. He emphasized that this flawed calculation resulted in their inability to foresee the strong resistance displayed by the Iranian people and armed forces. The spokesman stated that the US and Israel are attempting to force Iran to surrender through propaganda warfare, the display of so-called advanced weaponry, and the assassination of Iranian children, women, scientists, and senior commanders. He clearly stated that the US and Israel's desire to control the Strait of Hormuz will never be realized. (CCTV News)

data.title: MGBX to Launch Based Spot Trading in March 2026
data.description: MGBX has announced plans to introduce Based (BASED) spot trading on March 31, 2026, at 18:00 (SGT). According to Odaily, the platform will open for deposits on March 31, 2026, at 16:00 (SGT), with trading commencing at 18:00 (SGT) the same day. Withdrawals will be available starting April 2, 2026, at 19:00 (SGT).

data.title: Iran launches its 88th strike
data.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) announced today (March 31) that its navy launched the 88th wave of Operation True Commitment 4 at dawn, striking multiple US and Israeli targets in the Persian Gulf and surrounding areas. The announcement stated that the IRGC navy used ballistic missiles to strike an Israeli container ship in the central Persian Gulf. In subsequent coordinated strikes, a US Marine Corps bunker off the coast of the UAE, a US Fifth Fleet anti-drone system deployed near Manama Airport in Bahrain, and two advanced early warning radars at a US military base in Kuwait were all targeted and destroyed by precision drone strikes. The announcement emphasized that the Strait of Hormuz is now completely under Iranian control, and any hostile provocation will face missile and drone retaliation. (CCTV International News)

data.title: Gold's daily chart is showing signs of strength, but analysts warn of short-term moving average resistance.
data.description: In a report, RHB Research analyst Joseph Chai noted that the bullish momentum in New York Mercantile Exchange gold futures is accelerating, as seen on the daily chart. The analyst observed that gold prices broke through the $4,500 per ounce resistance level in the most recent trading day. Chai stated that bulls are now targeting the next resistance level. However, he added that gold prices may encounter strong selling pressure near the downtrend 20-day simple moving average (SMA). Data from the London Stock Exchange Group shows that the 20-day moving average is currently around $4,815.63 per ounce. (Jinshi)

data.title: MGBX will launch Based spot trading.
data.description: According to official news, MGBX will launch Based (BASED) spot trading on March 31, 2026 at 18:00 (SGT). Deposits will open at 16:00 (SGT) on March 31, 2026, and trading will open at 18:00 (SGT) on March 31, 2026. Withdrawals will open at 19:00 (SGT) on April 2, 2026.

data.title: Foreign Investors Record Historic Net Sell-off in South Korean Stocks in March
data.description: Foreign investors sold a record 35.9 trillion Korean won worth of South Korean stocks in March, marking the largest monthly net sell-off in history. According to Jin10, this unprecedented divestment reflects growing concerns over market volatility and geopolitical tensions affecting investor sentiment. Analysts suggest that the sell-off could have significant implications for South Korea's financial markets, potentially influencing stock prices and capital flows in the coming months.

data.title: Whale Resumes Long Position on CL with Significant Holdings
data.description: A major investor has reopened a long position on CL, holding 109,646 shares valued at $11.25 million, according to PANews. The leverage used for this position is one-fold. Previously, this investor executed two long trades on CL, earning a profit of $1.75 million.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Analyst Predicts Strengthening Bullish Momentum for Gold Futures
data.description: Gold futures on the New York Commodity Exchange are experiencing a surge in bullish momentum, according to Jin10. RHB Research analyst Joseph Chai noted in his report that the price of gold recently broke through the resistance level of $4,500 per ounce. Chai highlighted that the bulls are now targeting the next resistance level. However, he cautioned that gold prices might face strong selling pressure near the 20-day simple moving average (SMA), which is currently in a downtrend. Data from the London Stock Exchange Group indicates that the 20-day SMA is approximately $4,815.63 per ounce.

data.title: A whale that had previously profited $1.75 million from a long position in CL has reopened a long position in CL at $11.25 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale has reopened a long position of 109,600 CL tokens, worth $11.25 million, with a leverage ratio of 1x. This whale had previously gone long on CL twice, accumulating a profit of $1.75 million.

data.title: OKX Planet has been upgraded, introducing intelligent algorithm recommendations and integrating trading components.
data.description: According to official news, OKX has completed the upgrade of its community product, OKX Planet (Orbit). The new version features a redesigned content page, introducing personalized algorithm recommendations and embedding components for spot, contract, and strategy trading within posts, allowing users to directly complete trading operations while browsing content. Simultaneously, the information page has also been upgraded, adding modules such as a long-form article subscription channel, the OKX AI trading assistant, and a VIP exclusive service group, aiming to optimize the overall user experience. OKX Planet was launched in January 2026, and this upgrade represents its first major iteration since launch, focusing on improving the efficiency of connecting content and trading, and further enhancing the KOL and creator ecosystem.
